justification: The diff contains a critical syntax error in AppTest.java (`import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.super;` is invalid Java) and leaves JUnit 4 imports (`junit.framework.Test`, `TestSuite`) in the class despite migrating to JUnit 5. While it correctly uses `List.getFirst()` (Java 21) and `@BeforeEach`, the inclusion of binary build artifacts (target/) and the broken import make this a low-quality migration.
